nasb.text: The goat shall bear on itself all their iniquities to a solitary land; and he shall release the goat in the wilderness.

esv.text: The goat shall bear all their iniquities on itself to a remote area, and he shall let the goat go free in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 那隻山羊就擔當他們的一切罪孽，把它們帶到一個完全隔離的地；所以那人要把那隻山羊送到曠野裡去。

ccb.text: 这只公山羊担当他们的一切罪，将这一切罪带到荒无人烟的地方。
